title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Delhivery - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Delhivery - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Delhivery invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Delhivery:
Delhivery is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery!
